Experience Case Studies Skills
Product Leader, AI-Native Builder

Hung Kien Luu

Operator at scale + AI-native builder + fast execution system

Product leader building AI-enabled systems across payments and vertical SaaS. 0-to-1 builder and scale operator, most recently Head of Product for Square's Local Services vertical at $100B+ gross payments volume (GPV) scale. Pairs retention and growth work with AI-powered execution that compresses discovery cycles and increases decision velocity.

$100B+ GPV portfolio scope
1M+ active sellers
$1B+ annualized non-card bank payment volume

Experience

Square (Block, Inc.)

July 2018 - February 2026

Head of Product, Local Services Vertical

San Francisco, CA

Product Lead, Local Services Audience (2024-2026)

Led product strategy for Square's largest seller segment (Health & Beauty, Home Services, Professional Services), owning multi-surface workflows across Invoices, Appointments, Estimates, Contracts, Projects, POS Services/Bookings modes, and seller lifecycle growth.

  • Owned a $100B+ GPV portfolio across 1M+ active sellers, with scope expansion in 2025 to include Health & Beauty and Appointments.
  • Led 4 senior PMs and coordinated a 100+ person cross-functional team at peak; built an internal AI PM Second Brain to automate context ingestion and daily briefs.
  • Improved seller retention with statistical significance, contributing to retained and expanded GPV; operationalized AI agents for feedback ingestion and triage.

Senior Product Manager, Invoices & Payments (2018-2024)

  • Scaled Invoices ~10x into one of Square's top revenue product areas, growing into a $2xxM revenue business unit.
  • Expanded Invoices into a services workflow suite (Estimates, Contracts, Projects) plus job pipeline orchestration.
  • Introduced early AI-assisted quoting and invoicing features to explore automation of service sales and payment workflows.

Upwork

October 2015 - July 2018

Senior Product Manager

San Francisco, CA

  • Led PM for iOS and Android apps connecting business clients with freelancers; improved new mobile client conversion 4x.
  • Shipped applicant tracking, freelancer and job search, and onboarding; helped drive company-wide mobile-first transformation.

Pac-12 Networks

November 2013 - October 2015

Product Manager

San Francisco, CA

Led PM for Pac-12 mobile app, Pac-12.com, and International; increased engagement 50%+.

Scoutmore

July 2012 - November 2013

CEO & Co-Founder

San Francisco, CA

Built and shipped a travel app marketplace for user-generated itineraries using lean startup methods.

Cisco Systems

July 2010 - September 2012

Corporate Development Associate

San Jose, CA

Led acquisitions and strategic investments for the Collaboration Software business unit; executed an acquisition integrated into Cisco WebEx Teams.

Merrill Lynch

July 2008 - July 2010

Investment Banking Analyst

Palo Alto, CA

Completed 8 transactions (IPO, M&A, debt financings) valued at $8.6B+.

Case Studies

AI PM Second Brain

Problem: High coordination overhead and context switching slowed decision cycles across a large cross-functional organization.

Outcome: Reduced work about the work and increased decision velocity for PM and partner teams.

Non-Card Bank Payments at Scale

Problem: Service businesses needed lower-cost, more flexible payment rails beyond cards.

Outcome: Scaled to $1B+ annualized volume with strong growth trajectory.

Local Services Workflow Suite

Problem: Sellers lacked integrated software across the full service lifecycle.

Outcome: Improved software attach and created a stronger retention engine.

Payments & Infra
